title: Project and Card notes
description:
Projects are already created with a project notes file next to the projects.json file. Let's actually make use of that project file.In the projects page, when we right-click on a project, we have the option to delete the project. Let's add two more options there:
1. One to edit project notes (or that can be just called project notes)
2. Another option to open project folder, which should open the OS default file browser in the project folder
Each card has its sidecar. Let's add notes to it, a section with notes in the JSON file. To access these notes, we're going to add an extra item to the context menu in the gallery so that when the user right-clicks a card, he also gets an option for the card notes. For this to work, we will need a new component. We already have overlay components and a model, if I'm not wrong. Some are, so we can use these primitives to build on. Please look at the rules on components before building this new component. This new component should be an overlay with a text edit field and a save/cancel buttons.

attention.reason: Implementation complete (project + card notes); awaiting user live validation before done. Not committed per project no-commit rule.

activeSessionTitle: MPI-76 Project and Card notes implementation
